hero.title: Turan Hidayatov
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Web Developer
hero.description: A full-stack developer specialized in PHP, Laravel, and MySQL with expertise in RESTful APIs, MVC architecture, and backend development.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Turan Hidayatov, a full-stack web developer with expertise in PHP and Laravel backend development, RESTful APIs, MySQL/PostgreSQL, and MVC architecture. I have worked on diverse projects including courier, logistics, warehouse management, and government portal platforms.

git-beginners-guide.title: Version Control with Git: A Beginner's Guide
git-beginners-guide.description: Learn the fundamentals of Git and version control systems
git-beginners-guide.body_title: Version Control with Git: A Beginner's Guide
git-beginners-guide.paragraph1: Version control is one of the most essential tools in software development. Git is the most popular version control system today and every developer should know it. In this post, we'll explain the core concepts and workflow of Git.
features: Version history — track every change to your code
Collaboration — easily work with team members
Backup — all versions of your code are preserved
Merge — combine changes and resolve conflicts
git-beginners-guide.start_desc: The most important commands to work with Git:
git-beginners-guide.code:
# Create a new repository
git init

# Stage and commit changes
git add .
git commit -m "Initial commit"

# Create and switch to a branch
git branch feature-login
git checkout feature-login

# Merge changes
git merge feature-login

# Push to remote repository
git push origin main
git-beginners-guide.conclusion_desc: Git is an indispensable part of modern programming. Learning the basic commands and integrating them into your daily workflow is a crucial step in your developer career.

clean-code-principles.title: Clean Code Principles for Beginners
clean-code-principles.description: Learn the fundamental principles of writing clean, maintainable code
clean-code-principles.paragraph1: Writing clean code is one of the most important skills that separates experienced programmers from beginners. In this post, you'll learn the essential principles of writing clean, maintainable code and how to apply them in your projects.
features: Readability — code is easily understood by other developers
Maintainability — making changes and adding features becomes easier
Debugging — finding and fixing bugs is faster
Teamwork — better collaboration among team members
Testing — writing testable code becomes simpler
clean-code-principles.start_desc: Essential principles for writing clean code:
clean-code-principles.conclusion_desc: Writing clean code is a skill that takes time to develop, but it pays off in the long run. Readable, simple, and maintainable code is one of the most important steps toward becoming a professional developer.

web-development-guide.title: How to Start Web Development
web-development-guide.description: A complete beginner's guide to starting your web development journey in 2026
web-development-guide.paragraph1: Web development is one of the most popular and rewarding careers today. In this guide, we'll explain how to get started in web development, which technologies to learn, and how to take your first steps.
web-development-guide.why_desc: The essential technologies you need to master for web development:
features: HTML & CSS — structure and styling of web pages
Frontend Framework (React, Vue) — build user interfaces
Database (MySQL, PostgreSQL) — data storage and management
web-development-guide.start_desc: A step-by-step plan to start web development:
web-development-guide.conclusion_desc: Web development is an exciting and dynamic field. While there's a lot to learn at the beginning, if you take it step by step and practice consistently, you'll achieve great results in no time. Remember: the best way to learn is by building!
